user.title: Set up PowerView Home
user.description: Configure your PowerView encryption key. All shades on your network will be discovered automatically via Bluetooth.

data_description.hub_url: Base URL of your PowerView G3 hub, e.g. {hub_url_example}

error.invalid_key_format: HomeKey must be a valid hexadecimal string
error.invalid_key_length: HomeKey must be exactly 32 hex characters (16 bytes)
error.hub_connection_error: Cannot connect to the PowerView hub
